attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY            AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,          
 NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE           AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
NESL.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT   AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,         
 NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE    AS   BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,  
 NESL.ASGNMT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD           AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  
 NESL.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT    AS  END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
NESL.ENRCHMT_CUST_TYPE_CD               AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,    
 NESL.FLD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PTY_KEY       AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
NESL.HQ_REMOTE_CD                    AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
 NESL.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME       AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,    
 COALESCE(NESL.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,            
 NESL.NOVALID_SLSACCTGRP_PTYRSN_NAME    AS    NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
NESL.OWNED_FLG                       AS    OWNED_FLG,                 
 NESL.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY         AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
NESL.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTN_ID_INT         AS   SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
NESL.SALES_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PTY_KEY    AS   SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,
NESL.VALIDATION_MODE_CD   AS       VALIDATION_MODE_CD,     
 NESL.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  AS      VALIDATION_STATUS_CD    
 ,NBM.DV_FMV_FLG
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_FLVDT_ENDCST_SS_ITMSLSTRX_TV  NESL
INNER JOIN ( SELECT SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
            FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_FLVDT_ENDCST_SS_ITMSLSTRX_TV  
            WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE 
						FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS 
						WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_N_FLVDT_ENDCST_SS_ITMSLSTRX_TV')
			GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_SOL
ON SLCTD_SOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NESL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
ON NBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NESL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
 WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('XAAS')
AND NESL.ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD   = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NESL.END_TV_DT ='3500-01-01'

SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   AS  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,          
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  AS  BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
NEPT.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT                       AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,         
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,  
NEPT.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD  AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
NEPT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT  AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
NEPT.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD   AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD, 
NEPT.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY  AS FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
NEPT.HQ_REMOTE_CD  AS  HQ_REMOTE_CD,                  
NEPT.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME    AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,  
COALESCE(NEPT.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,            
NEPT.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME   AS  NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
NEPT.OWNED_FLG       AS   OWNED_FLG,                
NEPT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY    AS  SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
NEPT.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT    AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
NEPT.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY    AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
NEPT.VALIDATION_MODE_CD       AS  VALIDATION_MODE_CD,       
NEPT.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD    AS  VALIDATION_STATUS_CD         
,NBM.DV_FMV_FLG/*FMV Q2FY15*/        
FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_POS_TRX_LN_TV NEPT
INNER JOIN ( SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_POS_TRX_LN_TV WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_POS
ON SLCTD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NEPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
ON NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NEPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS'
AND NEPT.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NEPT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'

SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY         AS   BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,  
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE        AS   BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE, 
NEMT.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT                       AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,        
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS   BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
NEMT.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD      AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
NEMT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT     AS   END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
NEMT.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD              AS   ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
NEMT.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY            AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
NEMT.HQ_REMOTE_CD							 AS	  HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
NEMT.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME				 AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
COALESCE(NEMT.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,              
NEMT.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME			 AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  
NEMT.OWNED_FLG								 AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY			 AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
NEMT.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT			 AS   SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
NEMT.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY			 AS   SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
NEMT.VALIDATION_MODE_CD						 AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
NEMT.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD					 AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD          
,NBM.DV_FMV_FLG/*FMV Q2FY15*/
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV NEMT
INNER JOIN ( SELECT MANUAL_TRX_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_MNL_TRX
ON SLCTD_MNL_TRX.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
ON NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
ON NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ','SLS_ADJ')
AND NEMT.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NEMT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'

SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   AS  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,          
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  AS  BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,   
NEAR.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT                       AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,      
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,  
NEAR.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD  AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
NEAR.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT  AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
NEAR.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD   AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD, 
NEAR.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY  AS FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
NEAR.HQ_REMOTE_CD  AS  HQ_REMOTE_CD,                  
NEAR.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME    AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,  
COALESCE(NEAR.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,            
NEAR.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME   AS  NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
NEAR.OWNED_FLG       AS   OWNED_FLG,                
NEAR.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY    AS  SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
NEAR.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT    AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
NEAR.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY    AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
NEAR.VALIDATION_MODE_CD       AS  VALIDATION_MODE_CD,       
NEAR.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD    AS  VALIDATION_STATUS_CD         
,NBM.DV_FMV_FLG/*FMV Q2FY15*/
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_NAPLD_TRX_TV NEAR    
INNER JOIN ( SELECT AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_NAPLD_TRX_TV WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_NAPLD
ON SLCTD_NAPLD.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=NEAR.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
ON NBM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NEAR.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='AR'
AND NEAR.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NEAR.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'

SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY            AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,          
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE           AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
NESL.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT   AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,         
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE    AS   BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,  
NESL.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD    AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  
NESL.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT    AS  END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
NESL.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD     AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,    
NESL.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY   AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
NESL.HQ_REMOTE_CD                    AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
NESL.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME       AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,    
COALESCE(NESL.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,            
NESL.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME    AS    NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
NESL.OWNED_FLG                       AS    OWNED_FLG,                 
NESL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY   AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
NESL.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT   AS   SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
NESL.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY   AS   SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,
NESL.VALIDATION_MODE_CD   AS       VALIDATION_MODE_CD,     
NESL.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  AS      VALIDATION_STATUS_CD    
,NBM.DV_FMV_FLG/*FMV Q2FY15*/           
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_FOR_SO_LN_TV NESL
INNER JOIN ( SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_FOR_SO_LN_TV WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_SOL
ON SLCTD_SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NESL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
ON NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NESL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','AR')
AND NESL.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NESL.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
